query:
SELECT 
  l.id,
  CONCAT(m.module_number, '.', l.lesson_number) as lesson_code,
  l.title_ar,
  LENGTH(l.content_markdown) - LENGTH(REPLACE(l.content_markdown, 'وصف بصري', '')) / LENGTH('وصف بصري') as occurrence_count
FROM lessons l
JOIN modules m ON l.module_id = m.id
WHERE l.content_markdown LIKE '%وصف بصري%'
ORDER BY l.id;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user Bk7aCGrDyRKGN1q.root --database T3XiKgmnDLqJNf6z2vN3GW --execute 
SELECT 
  l.id,
  CONCAT(m.module_number, '.', l.lesson_number) as lesson_code,
  l.title_ar,
  LENGTH(l.content_markdown) - LENGTH(REPLACE(l.content_markdown, 'وصف بصري', '')) / LENGTH('وصف بصري') as occurrence_count
FROM lessons l
JOIN modules m ON l.module_id = m.id
WHERE l.content_markdown LIKE '%وصف بصري%'
ORDER BY l.id;
